cells.rationale: Well-specified ordered-resolution-chain fix against a nameable four-outcome acceptance, needing layout investigation but no Claude-tuned judgment, so GPT-first at the multi-step workhorse tier; beyond spark's mechanical envelope due to the verify-both-layouts probe.

Bounded fix hinging on a judgment fork (argv passthrough vs docs-only) with wrapped-guard injection/contract-widening caution and user-facing docs wording, both Claude-tuned reaches, yet small enough to stay short of opus.
